introSection: Batman Gotham City Escape is a steel launched roller coaster at Parque Warner Madrid in San Martín de la Vega, Community of Madrid, Spain. It opened on 13 May 2023.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The train launches out of the station into an airtime hill banked to the right, followed by a corkscrew and the second launch into a 45 metre tall outside top hat. It then drops into an s-bend and an airtime hill, and twists up into an inversion similar to a dive loop. Next, the train climbs into a twisted airtime hill, twisting from left to right, into the second corkscrew. The train then enters a wave turn and the final launch. An s-bend over a building leads into the final inversion, a zero-g stall. The train then dives into a building and climbs a vertical rollback. The train falls backwards, slows down, and rolls forwards into the station.

fullText:
Batman Gotham City Escape is a steel launched roller coaster at Parque Warner Madrid in San Martín de la Vega, Community of Madrid, Spain. It opened on 13 May 2023.

The train launches out of the station into an airtime hill banked to the right, followed by a corkscrew and the second launch into a 45 metre tall outside top hat. It then drops into an s-bend and an airtime hill, and twists up into an inversion similar to a dive loop. Next, the train climbs into a twisted airtime hill, twisting from left to right, into the second corkscrew. The train then enters a wave turn and the final launch. An s-bend over a building leads into the final inversion, a zero-g stall. The train then dives into a building and climbs a vertical rollback. The train falls backwards, slows down, and rolls forwards into the station.
